creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
This redis ports are in the tree:

databases/p5-AnyEvent-Redis AnyEvent::Redis - Non-blocking Redis client
databases/p5-Dancer-Plugin-Redis Redis database connector for Dancer
databases/p5-Redis        Perl binding for Redis database
databases/p5-Redis-hiredis Simple wrapper around hiredis C client
databases/p5-RedisDB      Perl extension to access redis database
databases/p5-RedisDB-Parser Perl extension for Redis protocol parser

I think it is done and can be closed.
